weather_report:
As nighttime envelops Boston, the skies wear a blanket of clouds that hint at a chill lingering in the air. The current temperature hovers just above freezing, a crisp reminder of the season's hold. A gentle north wind, whispering softly through the trees, adds to the coolness, inviting those venturing outdoors to layer up—perhaps a cozy sweater under a heavier coat. As the hours gracefully wane, the city’s lights sparkle against the backdrop of the clouded night, creating a serene tableau punctuated by the occasional flicker of distant stars peeking through.

Tomorrow promises a transformation, with the sun poised to brighten the skies and lift spirits as it rises. The day ahead calls for a refreshing encounter with sunny warmth, a stark contrast to tonight’s overcast blanket. A northeast breeze will accompany these beams of light, an ideal setting for those who wish to take a stroll along the Boston Common or find a quiet bench to soak in the pleasant rays. Attire that balances comfort with the crisp early spring air will serve well—perhaps light layers that can be shed as the day progresses. Seize this moment to savor a cup of coffee from a local café, or explore the charming streets where the essence of history mingles with the promise of new beginnings.
